# Q8 bin per-minute failure spikes (failed logon bruteforce)

**Dataset**: `gx_05_auth` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Failed-logon brute-force detection — count failures per source/account. Q8 bin per-minute failure spikes.

```sql
dataset = gx_05_auth | filter outcome = "failure" | bin ts span = 1m | comp count() as failures by user, ts | sort desc failures
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 6). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
